channel.title: Mimikatz on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Mimikatz on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Attacks and Exploits
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Exploitation" , "Web Application Attacks" , "Wireless Attacks" , "Social Engineering" , "Cloud Attacks" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master attacks and exploits for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn network, host, web, authentication, wireless, social engineering, cloud, and specialized system attacks plus scripting.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Post-exploitation and Lateral Movement
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Post-exploitation" , "Lateral Movement" , "Persistence" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Exfiltration" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master post-exploitation and lateral movement for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn persistence, lateral movement, staging and exfiltration, and cleanup and restoration.
